general.name: Energy Saver
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>398E219A-1F41-4017-A447-A5552CFE21F9</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>398E219A-1F41-4017-A447-A5552CFE21F9</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Energy Saver</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>BE11F8DA-1685-4E01-B8C1-C7B3089A0BCB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BE11F8DA-1685-4E01-B8C1-C7B3089A0BCB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>com.apple.EnergySaver.desktop.ACPower-ProfileNumber</key><integer>-1</integer><key>com.apple.EnergySaver.portable.ACPower-ProfileNumber</key><integer>-1</integer><key>com.apple.EnergySaver.portable.BatteryPower-ProfileNumber</key><integer>-1</integer><key>com.apple.EnergySaver.desktop.ACPower</key><dict><key>Disk Sleep Timer-boolean</key><true/><key>Automatic Restart On Power Loss</key><integer>1</integer><key>Display Sleep Timer</key><integer>15</integer><key>Sleep On Power Button</key><integer>1</integer><key>Wake On LAN</key><integer>1</integer><key>System Sleep Timer</key><integer>60</integer></dict><key>com.apple.EnergySaver.portable.ACPower</key><dict><key>Wake On LAN</key><integer>1</integer><key>Reduce Processor Speed</key><integer>0</integer><key>Disk Sleep Timer-boolean</key><true/><key>Dynamic Power Step</key><integer>1</integer><key>Automatic Restart On Power Loss</key><integer>1</integer><key>Display Sleep Timer</key><integer>15</integer><key>Sleep On Power Button</key><integer>1</integer><key>System Sleep Timer</key><integer>60</integer></dict><key>com.apple.EnergySaver.portable.BatteryPower</key><dict><key>Wake On LAN</key><integer>0</integer><key>Reduce Processor Speed</key><integer>0</integer><key>Disk Sleep Timer-boolean</key><true/><key>Dynamic Power Step</key><integer>1</integer><key>Automatic Restart On Power Loss</key><integer>0</integer><key>Display Sleep Timer</key><integer>15</integer><key>Sleep On Power Button</key><integer>1</integer><key>System Sleep Timer</key><integer>30</integer></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: Config Prof - Energy Saver - No System Sleep
Photo Studio Desktops - Saks - Nested Group
Saks Global Prestage Remote Devices - All
